title: Is it possible to export my entire account boards structure and connections as UML

posts.author: RyanBY (Ryan BY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Is it possible to export my entire account boards structure and connections as UML?

Alternatively, Excel may also work, assuming I can do it in a single click across my entire account (I’m an admin) as long as I don’t have to manually do this per board.

Thanks!
